name: The Sword of Alzcar
author: fireyvortex2112
extended_description:
Creators of the map

-Slix Killer

-TheErxinator

-ClevelandCavs1

-hockeyal5

-CentrinoUltra

-Heat2179

This map was created on PC by the oxkillerox team and was then converted and finished on Xbox.

RULES:

1-MUST play on peaceful

2-No breaking blocks

3-Sand is used as money

4-Stay on the paths/do not climb out of map

5-Feel free to record a lets play of this map

Original Xbox360 Map (.bin) download- https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/the-sword-of-alzcar/

Converted to LCE with Console2Lce
